title: Phase I2 — Data Infrastructure Design Compliance Matrix

deliverables.name: 01_data_infra_protocols.py
checks: 4 typing.Protocols defined: IPostgreSQLManager, IDistributedLog, IRuntimeAnalytics, IDataMigrator
16 abstract methods across 4 protocols (4 methods each)
All methods include data_trace_id: str parameter
All return types are Dict[str, Any] with documented keys

deliverables.name: 02_storage_and_sharding_models.py
checks: 8 enums defined: MigrationStatus, PartitionStrategy, ReplicationMode, IsolationLevel, LogStream, AnomalySeverity, MigrationGuardResult, MigrationPhase
10 dataclasses defined: StorageConfig, LogEntry, LogSegment, ReplicaSyncStatus, AnalyticsWindow, AnomalyRecord, MigrationManifest, PartitionMap, DashboardConfig
All models include data_trace_id: str
All timestamps use nanoseconds (int)
StorageConfig covers connection pool, partitions, replication

deliverables.name: 03_acid_sync_machine.md
checks: 7 ACID states defined: TX_START, VALIDATION, PARTITION_ROUTING, COMMIT, ACK_REPLICA, ROLLBACK, DEADLOCK
8 transitions defined: A1–A8 with guard conditions
8 ACID Guards defined: G1–G8 with pass/fail tables
Deterministic Migration Guard with SHA-256 formula
Compaction Guard with retention and reader checks
ACID Compliance Matrix with 10 concerns mapped to guards

deliverables.name: 04_integration_blueprint.md
checks: Architecture diagram with I1→I2→F2→F4 layers
3 detailed data flows with trace IDs: Persistent State, Log→Analytics, Migration
Correlation ID hierarchy: mission_trace_id → infra_trace_id → data_trace_id
data_trace_id generation rule with SHA-256
4 event hooks with payload schemas: SchemaDrift, LogReplicationLag, PartitionOverflow, MigrationFailure
Acceptance criteria: latency budgets, idempotency, ACID thresholds, rollback on failure
Compliance mapping summary table

deliverables.name: 05_canon_compliance_matrix.json
checks: All 5 design deliverables validated
Zero NON_COMPLIANT or NOT_FOUND entries
100% COMPLIANT status achieved

stop_conditions.condition: All 5 design deliverables exist at artifacts/design/i2/
ACID state machine with 8 guards documented
stop_conditions.evidence: 7 states, 8 transitions, 8 ACID Guards (G1–G8), Deterministic Migration Guard, Compaction Guard

stop_conditions.condition: Integration blueprint covers I1, F2, F4 flows
stop_conditions.evidence: 3 flows: I1→PG→F2, Log→Analytics→F4, Migration→Log→F2+F4 with event hooks

stop_conditions.condition: All model types include data_trace_id and partition_key where applicable
stop_conditions.evidence: All dataclasses carry data_trace_id; StorageConfig, PartitionMap, MigrationManifest include partition fields

stop_conditions.condition: Zero modifications to core/ or tests/
